title: Mysis: The Return
description:
In this horror game, you have been captured by an aggressive cat named Mysis. Trapped inside a terrifying house, you must find a way to escape before it is too late. Search the environment for useful items, including the missing digit papers, overcome obstacles, and use everything you can find to make it out alive.

Mysis is not your friend. She wants you to suffer and will do everything in her power to stop you from escaping. Stay alert, plan your every move, and avoid her at all costs, because she will relentlessly hunt you down before you can get out of the house.

The game features five difficulty levels: Easy, Normal, Hard, Extreme, and Out-of-Bounds. Choose the one that best matches the level of challenge you are looking for.
description_short: Captured by the aggressive cat Mysis, you must search a terrifying house for useful items and missing digit papers to escape. Stay alert, overcome obstacles, and avoid Mysis before she hunts you down.
